sections.title: Restore test credibility — FileLock strong semantics
sections.detail: try_acquire() is None = acquired, str = denied. Lock contention test verifies first_lock is None, second_lock is str, release, third_lock is None. Failure-release test verifies lock free after crashed run.

sections.title: Fix Hyperliquid response schema — position not data
sections.detail: _parse_hl_position prioritises position key over data key. Legacy data fixture uses use_legacy_fixture=True for backward compat. Official position shape tested.

sections.title: Whale mark price from fetch_all_mids
sections.detail: _inject_mark_prices() injects allMids per-coin into positions lacking markPx. Missing coin produces mapping_error. Zero mid rejected. Source degraded when mapping errors present.

sections.title: W2 Whale Domain integration
sections.detail: run_whale_mapper calls extract_snapshot(), detect_all_changes(), generate_alert_candidates(). Baseline suppresses large_new_position. Non-baseline detects increase/reduce/close. Parse/mapping errors reflected in source health.

sections.title: Previous snapshot persistence
sections.detail: State saved via atomic_write_json to state_dir/whale_state_{address}.json. is_baseline detected by previous_state_path.exists(). Two-run increase/reduce test passes. Disappeared position close test passes.

sections.title: Market Truth — no price=0 for unavailable
sections.detail: _build_workbench_bundle skips MarketSnapshot creation when m.ok=False or last_price is None. Health recorded as failed. Only LIVE DataMode when mode=live-public AND ok AND price valid. Degraded + unavailable both appear in warnings.

sections.title: CCXT preflight diagnostics
sections.detail: run_ccxt_preflight() checks: python exe, ccxt version, __file__, hasattr exchange class, exchange init, adapter import smoke. Paths sanitised. Used only in live-public mode. Exchange init failure blocks run.

sections.title: Operations wiring
sections.detail: insert_run() called at start, update_run_finish() in finally. source_health via record_health(). DBs initialised before pipeline. Run history test verifies real SQLite row round-trip.

sections.title: Output order
sections.detail: finished_at set before artifact writes. Report JSON contains finished_at and output_paths. Order: health recording → run history → finished_at → artifacts → lock release.

sections.title: Workbench atomic write
sections.detail: Uses render_workbench(bundle, str(html_path)) for atomic write. Fallback to string render + manual write. Test verifies W3 output_path renders correct file.

sections.title: Evidence binding
sections.detail: This file. R02 evidence marked superseded.

sections.title: Tests
sections.detail: 52 integration tests: official position shape, allMids injection, WhalePositionInput/W2 domain, baseline, two-run, close, parse errors, market truth, SQLite run history, final report shape, atomic workbench, lock contention, failure-release, CCXT preflight, stop marker, XSS, forbidden imports.

sections.title: Regression + Live Run
sections.detail: Regression tests: 52/52 integration PASS, 54/54 adapters+file_lock PASS. Live run pending.

known_limitations: Live-public mode feed handler still reports not_connected — real flash/news/TG readers not wired
CCXT preflight may fail if ccxt package not installed in environment (runs pip install adapters.txt)
Whale state directory persistence is local to state_dir — no cross-host sharing
No live run executed yet — bounded live-public no-send pending
